top3.sql:
SELECT i_item_id,
       i_item_desc,
       SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq = (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 12 LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc
ORDER BY sales DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1999
    AND d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc
ORDER BY 
    sales DESC
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT i_item_id,
       i_item_desc,
       SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE d_month_seq = (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 12 LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc
ORDER BY sales DESC
LIMIT 100
